hero.title: Six industries, one vertically integrated tannery.
hero.intro: From fashion retail to industrial footwear, our leather and finished goods serve markets that each demand something different from a hide - we tan and manufacture for all of them under one roof.

markets.title: Fashion & Retail
markets.body: Belts, bags, wallets and small leather goods for brands, wholesalers and retailers, private label or fully custom.

markets.title: Equestrian & Saddlery
markets.body: Saddles, harness, bridles and tack, made in Kanpur, home of the world's largest saddlery centre.

markets.title: Automotive & Furniture
markets.body: Technical leather for automotive and furniture upholstery, straps and components, held to component-level tolerances.

markets.title: Industrial & Safety Footwear
markets.body: Abrasion- and water-resistant leather finished to the durability standards industrial and safety footwear demands.

markets.title: Pet Accessories
markets.body: Collars, leads and harnesses built with saddlery-grade hides and hardware - comfortable, durable, retail-ready.

markets.title: Hunting & Outdoor
markets.body: Cartridge belts, holsters and field gear in heavier-weight, reinforced leather, built for actual field use.

cta.heading: We build custom leather solutions too.
